purpose: Neutral preservation + verification of public model-deprecation/lifecycle primary sources. No charge grading, no Convention mapping, no Pattern Registry entry.
capture_method: curl -sSL (raw HTML) + WebFetch (content extraction); sha256 over raw bytes
custody_state: HASHED-LOCAL (raw/ git-ignored + re-fetchable via refetch.sh; hashes committed)
